tracks.rawText: 3:12Serrated Bassv5.5Angry brostep-driven dubstep/EDM at 140 BPM with detuned FM growls, serrated wavetable bass, and brutal midrange reese stabs, Heavy sidechained sub, syncopated half-time drums, snappy snare layers, metallic fills, and pitch-bent synth attacks, Big festival drops, filter sweeps, distorted impacts, and wide stereo bass processingPublishRemix
tracks.title: Serrated Bass

tracks.rawText: 2:25Serrated Bassv5.5Angry brostep-driven dubstep/EDM at 140 BPM with detuned FM growls, serrated wavetable bass, and brutal midrange reese stabs, Heavy sidechained sub, syncopated half-time drums, snappy snare layers, metallic fills, and pitch-bent synth attacks, Big festival drops, filter sweeps, distorted impacts, and wide stereo bass processingPublishRemix
tracks.title: Serrated Bass

tracks.rawText: 1:31Skankin' Sub Dropv5.5Virtuosic dubstep reggae at a rapid 148 BPM, with skanking offbeat guitar chops, spring-reverb organ bubbles, deep dub delay throws, and a razor-tight one-drop meets half-time drum grid, Aggressive wobble bass, pitch-bent sub drops, syncopated rimshots, and agile percussion fills keep it playful yet technically densePublishRemix
tracks.title: Skankin' Sub Drop

tracks.rawText: 2:12Skankin' Sub Dropv5.5Virtuosic dubstep reggae at a rapid 148 BPM, with skanking offbeat guitar chops, spring-reverb organ bubbles, deep dub delay throws, and a razor-tight one-drop meets half-time drum grid, Aggressive wobble bass, pitch-bent sub drops, syncopated rimshots, and agile percussion fills keep it playful yet technically densePublishRemix
tracks.title: Skankin' Sub Drop

tracks.rawText: 2:01Wobble Skankv5.5dubstep reggae with a lurching half step groove that starts off kilter then locks into a steady Reggae, Ska, Rock, Pop Rock detuned sub bass with wobble lfo deep 808 kick snappy rimshot and chopped reggae guitar on the offbeats dubwise spring reverb tape delay throws Reggae, Ska, Rock, Pop Rocking organ stabs and a gritty wobble synth dropPublishRemix
tracks.title: Wobble Skank

tracks.rawText: 1:44Bassline of the Damnedv5.5Epic dubstep with a gut-punch drop on second listen: halftime drums, snarling midrange bass in a wobble-and-growl pattern, sub-bass pressure, metallic snare hits, and gritty synth stabs, Wide risers, filtered breakdowns, and punchy sidechain give it a huge, dark, bass-heavy texturePublishRemix
tracks.title: Bassline of the Damned

tracks.rawText: 1:27Bassline of the Damnedv5.5Epic dubstep with a gut-punch drop on second listen: halftime drums, snarling midrange bass in a wobble-and-growl pattern, sub-bass pressure, metallic snare hits, and gritty synth stabs, Wide risers, filtered breakdowns, and punchy sidechain give it a huge, dark, bass-heavy texturePublishRemix
tracks.title: Bassline of the Damned

tracks.rawText: 2:43Huapango de la Estrella (Remix)v5CoverVirtuosic huapango at brisk tempo with syncopated violin lead, jarana and quinta huapanguera locking into intricate 6/8–3/4 cross-rhythms, Bright guitarrón, crisp tambora accents, rapid falsetas, and sharp hand percussion create a playful, off-balance groove with tight dynamic pushes, echoing folk dance energyPublishRemix
tracks.title: Huapango de la Estrella (Remix)
